title: Unified Builder Profile
description: Schema for ~/.claude/profiles/builder.json — the shared user profile bus (Pattern #11). The shared block is read by every plugin; each plugin owns and mutates only its plugins.<name> block. Decay metadata lives in nested _meta blocks per namespace (Spec Decision #1 — Pattern #11 namespace isolation).

schema_version.description: Profile schema version. Bump only on breaking shape changes.

last_updated.description: ISO date or datetime of last write. Updated by any namespace owner that mutates its block.

decay_disabled.description: Opt-out flag for the decay subsystem. When true, check_decay() returns null without scanning _meta blocks.

shared.description: Cross-plugin user profile fields. All plugins read; updates flow through the named update_shared_profile step.

_meta.description: Decay metadata for shared fields. Keyed by dotted field path (e.g. 'preferences.persona', 'technical_experience.level').

plugins.description: Per-plugin namespaces. A plugin MUST only read/write its own plugins.<name> block. Cross-plugin writes are forbidden by Pattern #11.

metaEntry.description: Per-field decay metadata. Stored in the namespace _meta block keyed by dotted field path.

last_confirmed.description: ISO date the field was last stamped fresh.

stale.description: Set by check_decay() when last_confirmed + ttl_days has elapsed.

ttl_days.description: Days until this field decays. Defaults: persona/tone/pacing/communication_style=180, technical_experience.level=365, languages/frameworks=90.

metaBlock.description: A namespace _meta block. Keys are dotted field paths within the same namespace. Values are either metaEntry decay records OR plugin-specific sub-shapes (e.g. last_seen_complements). anyOf — not oneOf — because a metaEntry IS itself an object and would otherwise match both branches.

pluginBlock.description: A single plugin's namespace. Schema is intentionally open — each plugin defines its own internal shape. Only the _meta key is reserved.

lastSeenComplements.description: Vibe Cartographer's snapshot of detected Pattern #13 complements at last terminal session-log entry.

list.description: Skill identifiers detected during the most recent session (e.g. 'superpowers:brainstorming').

timestamp.description: ISO datetime when this snapshot was written.

previous_diff_count.description: Count of complements gained or lost vs the prior session's snapshot.

notable_change_at.description: ISO datetime when previous_diff_count last hit the material-change threshold (>=2). Null if never.
